reviews.author: Priyanka Sharma
reviews.review_body: This school is the worst school in the world 😡😡😡.I don't want to say anything else about the school. pre primary school is good but. after it so worst .🤐

reviews.school_name: Fr. Agnel School - Sector Alpha II
reviews.author: yati prabha pal
reviews.review_body: This is the worst school I have ever experienced in my life. The teachers are very rude. The principal is really boring and rude. They deduct marks for no reason. The fees are really high as compared to other schools. The school teachers are always demanding for subject enrichment activities on pastel sheets instead of making the students do it in their notebooks. They are literally wasting pages. The school is now half as it was in 2019. It is half in size than it was before corona. I want this school to improve something. Because if this continues, this school organisation might extinct...

reviews.school_name: Fr. Agnel School - Sector Alpha II
reviews.author: kiran kapurvan
reviews.review_body: Best school in greater Noida.... Teachers are very supportive

reviews.school_name: Fr. Agnel School - Sector Alpha II
reviews.author: Aayushmaan Sharma
reviews.review_body: This school is the best school in the entire world. The education system of this school is really good. The cooperation of the faculty staff is just awesome. The school design is awesome, the principal is rally kind, humble, intelligent and nice. The Manager is really humble, Kind and always keeps launching drives which will help the poor and the needy. This is the ultimate school for perusing.

reviews.school_name: Fr. Agnel School - Sector Alpha II
reviews.author: Saurabh Singh
reviews.review_body: nice school with talented student in every field and the school has good football and chess players. and the KG children's also enjoy the school's environment and some teacher's are very caring. there is a hostel in school and the hosteler's are so talented in every field Art,Football etc.
